notes.background: Warm parchment (#FBF7F2) as base, white (#FFFFFF) for surfaces
notes.borders: Warm light gray for subtle borders
notes.text: Warm near-black (#2C2420) for primary, warm gray (#6B6560) for secondary
notes.accent: Terracotta coral (#E07850) for primary actions — warm, inviting, approachable
notes.secondary_accent: Sage green (#7B8F6B) for AI elements — nature tones, calm guidance
notes.philosophy: Light, warm, and intimate — conveying love, trust, and meaningful connection. Designed for the gifting audience after YC design research (April 2026).
